faq_1_answer: The difficulty depends on your formatting; resumes for this role often fail when using multi-column layouts that confuse the parser.
faq_2_question: How does Oleeo rank candidates?
faq_2_answer: The system compares the text in your resume to the job description and assigns a percentage match score based on keyword frequency.
faq_3_question: Can Oleeo read images or charts?
faq_3_answer: No, Oleeo cannot read text embedded in images. Any skills shown in icons will be completely invisible to the recruiter.
faq_4_question: What is the most important tip for Oleeo?
faq_4_answer: Oleeo is used for high-volume roles; it prioritizes 'Minimum Qualifications' like specific degrees or licenses.
faq_5_question: Does Oleeo prefer PDF or Word?
faq_5_answer: While modern versions of Oleeo support both, Word documents are slightly more reliable for older versions of the software.
